title: RASS NeRF Benchmark Artifact
subtitle: Risk-audited compact scene lists for NeRF benchmarking
description:
RASS / NeRF Benchmark Artifact packages compact scene lists and audit metadata for an anonymized NeRF benchmark study on Nutrition5k-derived scenes.

The dataset includes RASS-48 for rapid screening, RASS-96 for stronger compact reporting, a full ZipNeRF audit scene list, cross-method common IDs, normalized descriptors, k=6 regime labels, audit thresholds, Wilson LCB utilities, Croissant/RAI metadata, and copied audit diagnostics.

Use this artifact for reproducible benchmark-subset inspection, low-cost screening, and audit protocol development. Full leaderboard-quality claims still require the full audit population and external per-scene NeRF metrics; raw Nutrition5k-derived assets and complete NeRF outputs are not redistributed unless permitted.
userSpecifiedSources: Nutrition5k-derived NeRF benchmark scene assets and repository-local anonymized RASS audit outputs. Raw Nutrition5k-derived images, scene assets, and full NeRF outputs are not redistributed in this artifact unless separately permitted by their upstream terms.
